title: Chore: Add CI/CD pipeline
original_text: Added CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions. Implemented automated testing on every commit. Added automated deployment to staging. Implemented automated deployment to production with approval. Added rollback capability. Result: CI/CD pipeline operational.
expected_subject: chore(ci): add CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions
expected_body_lines: - Implement automated testing on every commit
- Implement automated deployment to production with approval
expected_command: git commit -m "chore(ci): add CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions"
